trivia: The only supersonic airliner to succeed in service: Mach 2 across the Atlantic for 27 years, London to New York in three and a half hours. Retired in 2003; never replaced.
Its droop nose lowered for landing so pilots could see the runway past that impossible delta profile.
funFacts: Cruised at Mach 2.04, twice the speed of sound.
Skin heat made the airframe stretch about 15 cm in flight.
